role: This directory represents the root of the ArchSpine mirror system, containing the agent skill definition for AI architectural awareness and the centralized template artifacts for governance, prompts, rules, and documentation.
responsibility: The ArchSpine root directory collectively enables AI assistants to detect, query, and respect an ArchSpine control plane within a repository, while providing the foundational template artifacts—governance documents, prompt building blocks, architectural rules and conventions, and high-level documentation views—that define the system's external contract and surface maintenance risks.

children.role: Agent skill definition that instructs an AI assistant on how to detect, query, and respect an ArchSpine control plane inside a repository to gain architectural awareness.
This directory serves as the central repository of template artifacts governing the ArchSpine mirror system's identity, prompt construction, architectural rules, and external documentation views.
